note: Schengen visa application centres in Türkiye. Most Schengen states outsource to VFS Global / iDATA / TLScontact / BLS / Kosmos. Refresh quarterly; providers occasionally change contracts. Non-Schengen DiscoverEU participants (IE, CY, RO, BG) are excluded from this list per the sub-project 2 design spec.

Vize ücreti 90 EUR, TL nakit olarak ödenir.
